nameMeanings.name: Kaye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire), Irish (Kerry), and North German: variant of   Kay  . Compare   Keye  .

variants.name: Kay
meanings: English: nickname from northern Middle English ka, kae, kay ‘jackdaw’, from Old Norse ká or Old English cā. See also Daw .
English: nickname from Middle English cai, kay, kei ‘left-handed, clumsy’.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English kai(e), kei(e) ‘key’, applied to a maker of keys (compare Kear ), or alluding to the office of keeper or bearer of keys, but clear evidence for this is wanting.

variants.name: Keye
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire), Irish (Kildare), and North German: variant of   Kaye  .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Kaye was born in 1339, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John I Kaye, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Fincheden, was 10. He married Elizabeth Amyas or Amias about 1358. He died in 1424, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence Kaye est né en 1339, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John I Kaye, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fincheden, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Amyas or Amias environ 1358. Il est décédé en 1424, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence Kayeが1339年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウッドソメ リーズで生まれた時，父Sir John I Kayeは28歳，母Margaret Finchedenは10歳であった。約1358年にElizabeth Amyas or Amiasと結婚した。彼は1424年に85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Kaye(이)가 1339년 영국 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Kaye(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fincheden(은)는 10세였다. 그는 대략 1358년 Elizabeth Amyas or Amias(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1424년 85세의 나이로 사망했다.
